extortion.description: microleasingplc.com zoominfo.com/c/micro-leasing/482150678 Micro Leasing Public Company Limited specializes in providing financing services for second-hand trucks, including truck purchase loans and refinancing options. The company targets clients in need of commercial vehicles, positioning itself as a leader in the second-hand truck financing sector in Thailand. In addition to truck financing, they also offer motorcycle loans and insurance brokerage services. Micro Leasing aims to support business expansion and improve liquidity for its clients while providing excellent consulting services
